summary.en: CHEQUER, Inc, a cloud data security solution startup, announced on the 13th that it has signed a contract with VESSL AI, a machine learning development platform, to provide a 'QueryPie' solution for data security in AI services.
summary.ko: CHEQUER, Inc, a cloud data security solution startup, announced on the 13th that it has signed a contract with VESSL AI, a machine learning development platform, to provide a 'QueryPie' solution for data security in AI services.
summary.ja: CHEQUER, Inc, a cloud data security solution startup, announced on the 13th that it has signed a contract with VESSL AI, a machine learning development platform, to provide a 'QueryPie' solution for data security in AI services.

title.en: QueryPie signed a contract to supply AI and Data security solutions to VESSL AI
title.ko: QueryPie signed a contract to supply AI and Data security solutions to VESSL AI
title.ja: QueryPie signed a contract to supply AI and Data security solutions to VESSL AI
